free_text: Measurements of gamma-ray production cross sections and
spectra in inelastic interaction of 14 MeV neutrons
with nuclei C, O, Mg, Al, Fe, Zr, Mo, W and Pb
Deuteron energy is 130 keV, pulse repetition
Measurements were made at 125 deg relative to
. Uncertainties of solid angle, gamma rays attenuation
factor, factor for annihilation radiation were
. Errors of the unfolding procedure and statistical
errors of pulse-height distributions were taken into
account for differential cross section errors.
determination of N0 - integral effective pulse
neutron yield from the target into 4PI - 3%
Kmult - contribution of multiple neutron and
ncol -number of primary collisions of neutrons
with nuclei per one effective incident neutron - 4.5%
Ngi - number of gamma-rays in the i-th energy
total error of integral gamma-ray production
STATUS information was updated for new rules.
